film.title: Lady Death
film.overview: When accused by the townspeople of being in league with the Devil, Hope finds herself in a satanic deal for her life. After refusing the terms of the deal, she transforms into the powerful Lady Death and vows to wrest control of hell from her father.

dialogues.dialogue: Please understand it takes a commitment... You're right, Boris, but... Dad said that I am committed to the war effort.  Dad said that I am committed to the war effort.  I cannot sit here, ashamed. And you? Can you do that?  It is more important for me here. Everyone does their part.  I have a degree and a trained shooter.
dialogues.cause_raw: not contributing to the war effort

dialogues.dialogue: I was accepted.  First on the list! Bravo, congratulations.  You can be proud of me for once.  Misha...be gentle with her today.  Father! When will you be back? Father?
dialogues.cause_raw: being accepted first on a list

dialogues.dialogue: to learn how to fight in this field is leading to a great number of deaths.  I do not want to dig out or mask it.  You need to change your uniform? Our uniform is our pride.  Comrades, meet Sergeant Lyuda Pavlichenko.  As they say, God sent us a sniper.
